name: get_recent_news
description: Fetch recent news articles for a given stock ticker symbol. Returns article titles, publishers, links, and publication times.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL).

name: get_sentiment_data
description: Analyze sentiment from recent news headlines for a stock ticker. Returns an overall sentiment score and per-article sentiment breakdown using keyword-based analysis.

ticker.description: The stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL).
